subTitle: High-performance, cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android, built with React Native and featuring robust full-stack integrations.

apps.title: Full-Stack E-commerce Mobile Solution
apps.description: A premium cross-platform e-commerce mobile application designed for the sanitary and hardware industry. Built with React Native, it features a seamless shopping experience, secure payment processing, and real-time inventory management.
descriptionPoints: Architected a high-performance cross-platform app for Android & iOS using React Native.
Integrated secure Stripe payment gateway for seamless, frictionless transactions.
Developed a custom dynamic cart system with real-time backend synchronization.
Implemented secure user authentication and profile management via Firebase and Node.js.
Engineered a comprehensive admin dashboard for real-time order and product tracking.
Leveraged a robust tech stack: Node.js, Express, MySQL, and Firebase Storage.

apps.title: Tap & Win - Real-time Prize Game App
apps.description: An interactive, real-time lottery-style mobile game built with React Native. It features animated reward mechanics, mobile wallet integrations, and live socket communication for a highly engaging user experience.
descriptionPoints: Developed interactive game mechanics with real-time Socket.io integration.
Integrated local mobile wallets (EasyPaisa, JazzCash) and Stripe for global payments.
Implemented smooth, performance-driven animations using React Native Reanimated.
Engineered a scalable backend architecture with Node.js and MySQL for high concurrency.
Designed a transparent prize tracking system with live winner history and leaderboards.
Focused on security with encrypted user data and fraud-resistant game logic.

apps.title: ElectroPak - Smart Electronics Ecosystem
apps.description: A comprehensive mobile solution developed as a Final Year Project. It integrates e-commerce for electrical items, on-demand service booking for electricians, and a reward-based engagement system.
descriptionPoints: Architected a multi-functional ecosystem combining retail and service sectors.
Integrated real-time electrician service booking with geolocation support.
Implemented a secure wallet system supporting multiple local and global providers.
Developed a robust full-stack backend with Node.js and MySQL for data integrity.
Designed a reward-based gamification system to increase user retention.
Showcased at a university level as a high-impact technical implementation.

apps.title: Pic Nova AI - AI-Powered Media Suite
apps.description: An advanced AI-driven photo and video editing application. It leverages cutting-edge machine learning models to provide background removal, AI filters, and real-time media stylization.
descriptionPoints: Integrated computer vision models for AI-powered object detection and removal.
Developed high-performance AI filters for real-time photo and video stylization.
Engineered cloud-based ML processing pipelines for efficient mobile editing.
Built a secure backend API with Node.js to manage AI model requests and storage.
Implemented seamless media management using Firebase Storage and Firestore.
Optimized cross-platform performance for a fluid creative workflow.

apps.title: Mechify - On-Demand Mechanic Service
apps.description: A smart mobile application combining car spare parts e-commerce with real-time, on-demand mechanic discovery. Features Google Maps integration for live tracking and service booking.
descriptionPoints: Engineered a dual-purpose platform for automotive retail and emergency services.
Integrated Google Maps API for real-time technician discovery and live tracking.
Developed a comprehensive e-commerce flow for automotive spare parts.
Implemented a secure service booking system with real-time status updates.
Built a robust full-stack backend using Node.js and MySQL for high reliability.
Recognized as a high-utility Final Year Project with significant commercial potential.
